zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Milbourne於大約1465年出生在英國賀福爾波吉爾時，她的父親Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire31歲，母親Jane Baskerville27歲。她於1480年與William Rudhall結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年在英國賀福爾特尼--也享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Milbourne于大约1465年出生在英国賀福爾波吉爾时，她的父亲Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire31岁，母亲Jane Baskerville27岁。她于1480年与William Rudhall结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年在英国賀福爾特尼--也享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Milbourne was born about 1465, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, was 31 and her mother, Jane Baskerville, was 27. She married William Rudhall in 1480. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1556, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Milbourne est née environ 1465, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Baskerville, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Rudhall en 1480. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1556, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Milbourne um 1465 in Burghill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire 31 und ihre Mutter Jane Baskerville 27. Sie hat 1480 William Rudhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Milbourne è nata il circa 1465 nel Burghill, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Jane Baskerville, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William Rudhall nel 1480. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Milbourneが約1465年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshireは31歳，母Jane Baskervilleは27歳であった。1480年にWilliam Rudhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Milbourne(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Baskerville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1480년 William Rudhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Milbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jane Baskerville, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Rudhall em 1480. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1556, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Milbourne родилась около 1465 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Baskerville, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Rudhall в 1480 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1556 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Milbourne nació aproximadamente 1465, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Jane Baskerville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con William Rudhall en 1480. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1556, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 92 años.
